title: ModFest 1.21
description: Explore a demo world for 57 entirely new NeoForge-compatible 1.21.1 mods of the theme: Technology, Time, and Throwbacks! Created in a Fall 2024 event hosted by ModFest.
body:
Stasis - the town of four ages!
A collaboration between 76 modders, as hosted by ModFest.
--- **ModFest 1.21** was a mod development jam that ran from October 11th through November 4th, 2024. This modpack contains all submissions, as well as a showcase world built by participants to show off their mods! **Key Features**: - Witness the dawn of 58 mods, including **Armistice**, **Charta**, **FBombs**, and **Life-Size Bdubs**! - Explore a circular world split into four "ages" - Stone, Iron, Industrial, and information! - Traverse the map with prehistoric angry birds, fancy bombs, ninja outfits, and a *lot* of watches! - Whistle along to [over an hour of original music](https://modfest.bandcamp.com/album/modfest-121-time-technology-throwbacks-original-modpack-soundtrack) made just for the event! - Find and earn 130 collectible "shards", tracking booth visits, exploration, and mastery! - Decide for yourself - was the town of Stasis really eaten by a world-swallowing dragon? or is that just what the locals believe?

Heading down, fragment? Brace for impact...
--- ModFest is made possible by the modding community.
A full list of credits for each submitted mod can be found on the [submissions page](https://modfest.net/1.21/submissions). This modpack and world was originally showcased on a multiplayer server in the fall of 2024.
Check out the [ModFest website](https://modfest.net) to see more events, or join [our discord](https://discord.gg/gn543Ee) to tour or participate in the next event live!
